title: PinPoint
description: PinPoint your EXACT location! Good for people who need to set things up very exactly!
body:
### How to Install:

1. Download the mod.
2. Place it in your `mods` folder.
3. Launch the game.
4. Change the settings in Mod Menu.
5. Open F3.
5. Enjoy!
---
### What does the mod do?
* Note: This mod only changes the number of decimal places shown for coordinates in the F3 debug screen.
* View your coordinates with higher precision!
* Customize the precision for each coordinate (X, Y, and Z) individually.
---

### Dependencies:
* [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
* [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
